data.title: LifeMD (Nasdaq: LFMD) declared $0.5546875 dividend/share for its 8.875% Series A Stock.
data.description: LifeMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: LFMD), a prominent provider of virtual primary care services and pharmacy solutions, declared a cash dividend for its 8.875% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (Nasdaq: LFMDP) shareholders. This dividend amounts to $0.5546875 per share, as approved by the company's Board of Directors, on December 26, 2025.

data.title: VCI Global reveals 2026 "Sovereign RWA Ecosystem" roadmap; proprietary exchange to tokenize assets across sectors.
data.description: A new RWA exchange is set to launch with the goal of boosting transparency, liquidity, and accessibility in various asset classes. This platform will provide enhanced trading opportunities for precious metals, ESG assets, real estate, and infrastructure investments. The exchange aims to cater to a wide range of investors and increase the efficiency of asset transactions. By offering a centralized marketplace, the RWA exchange is expected to streamline processes and improve market dynamics. Investors can expect a more transparent and liquid environment for trading a diverse range of assets.

China POV: Climbing the Great Wall It’s time to take a hike … on the Great Wall of China! It’s a huge part of the country’s history and it’s one of the Seven Wonders of the World. But what’s it like, up close and personal? Come along as CGTN’s Michael Marillier finds out …

data.title: Dove and Bridgerton collaborate on limited-edition collection with 4 scents, available at Target. Launches ahead of show's season 4 premiere.
data.description: A set of four alluring fragrances tied to the upcoming season 4 premiere of the popular series Bridgerton is now on sale only at Target. Dove, a renowned beauty brand, has partnered with the globally acclaimed show in this exclusive collaboration. Headquartered in Hoboken, N.J., the collection launch occurred on December 26, 2025, creating significant buzz among fans eagerly anticipating the new season.

data.title: LG launches UltraGear Evo, redefining 5K gaming with AI upscaling technology. New lineup includes OLED, MiniLED & ultra-wide formats.
data.description: LG Electronics has introduced a new premium gaming monitor brand called UltraGear evo™, marking a global launch on December 26, 2025. The brand aims to push the boundaries of high-resolution gaming with a lineup that includes OLED, new MiniLED, and ultra-wide formats. This move signifies LG's commitment to offering cutting-edge technology to gamers worldwide.

data.title: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) terminated proposed business combination with Roosevelt Resources on Dec. 24, 2025.
data.description: A company specializing in wellness products, Arcadia Biosciences, Inc. ® (Nasdaq: RKDA), located in Dallas, shared today that they were notified on December 24, 2025, by Roosevelt Resources, LP, of the termination of a Securities Exchange Agreement. This agreement, dated December 4, 2024, outlined a potential business merger between Arcadia and Roosevelt, which is now discontinued as per the agreement terms.

data.title: Ethereum to scale with ZK tech in 2026, targeting 10,000 TPS.
data.description: This year, Ethereum plans to facilitate the transition to ZK-proofs to enable scaling to 10,000 transactions per second (TPS). The implementation of ZK-proofs is anticipated to play a crucial role in this scalability strategy.

data.title: World's longest highway tunnel, 22.13-km Tianshan Shengli Tunnel, opened on Dec 26, 2025, making travel in Xinjiang easier.
data.description: Today, on December 26, 2025, the Tianshan Shengli Tunnel, spanning an impressive 22.13 kilometers in length, was inaugurated for public use. This tunnel now holds the title of the world's longest highway tunnel. Its opening marks a significant improvement in transportation between northern and southern Xinjiang, offering a more efficient route for travelers. The completion of this tunnel has notably reduced the travel time from Urumqi and improved connectivity between the regions.

data.title: Uxin stock gains with new funding and positive financial results. Raised $50 million from NIO Capital and Prestige Shine Group.
data.description: Uxin Limited, a Chinese used-car retailer listed on NASDAQ under the symbol UXIN, is boosting its brick-and-mortar expansion with fresh institutional funding alongside enhanced financial performance. In its latest quarterly report, the company revealed an impressive equity raise and notable growth in revenue, vehicle sales, and key profitability indicators. Through binding share subscription agreements with NIO Capital and Prestige Shine Group Limited affiliates, Uxin has secured a total of $50 million in funding. This investment signifies ongoing support from its long-term backers during this growth phase.

data.title: Curaleaf opens second dispensary in Millcreek, Pennsylvania, offering enhanced in-store and online ordering experience. ~68 characters
data.description: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. is improving its in-store and online ordering experience by introducing new location features. The expansion aims to provide better access to Curaleaf's national brands. The company made this announcement in Stamford, Conn., on December 26, 2025. Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. trades under the tickers TSX: CURA and OTCQX: CURLF. They are a prominent global provider in the industry.

data.title: Jeffs' Brands to sell 7% of Fort Technology, valuing it up to CAD $20 million. Transition towards homeland security and advanced technologies.
data.description: In a move to refocus its efforts, Company is selling off its retail assets to concentrate on homeland security and advanced technologies. This strategic shift will involve divesting X number of retail assets in order to prioritize the development and growth of its homeland security and advanced technology sectors. This decision comes as Company aims to position itself as a key player in the advancement and innovation of homeland security solutions, with a target of increasing revenue from this sector by X%. The divestment of retail assets will allow Company to allocate more resources towards enhancing its capabilities in homeland security and advanced technologies, driving future growth and competitiveness in these key areas.
